[]; if (stage.eventStageId === "visual") return pts.length > 0 || m.visualDefectsPareto.length > 0; if (stage.eventStageId === "valve-integrity") return pts.length > 0 || m.quarantineLog.length > 0; return pts.length > 0; }); const totalPages = 2 + reportStages.length * 2 + 6; const tail = 2 + reportStages.length * 2; // last stage page number const pg = (n: number) => String(n).padStart(2, "0"); return (
{/* PAGE 1: TITLE, GOVERNANCE & DOCUMENT CONTROL */}

Global Quality Formulas:

1. Overall Rejection Rate = ( Σ Stage Rejections / Gross Ingested Volume ) × 100 = {(m.rate * 100).toFixed(3)}%
2. First Pass Yield (FPY) = Π ( 1 - r_stage ) = {(m.fpy * 100).toFixed(3)}%

Stage-by-Stage Yield Math Balance Sheet

{STAGES.map((s) => { const data = m.stageDataMap[s.id]; const checkedSum = data ? data.points.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.checked, 0) : 0; const rejectedSum = data ? data.points.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.rejected, 0) : 0; const yieldRate = checkedSum > 0 ? (checkedSum - rejectedSum) / checkedSum : 1.0; return ( ); })}

Adjudication Audit Policy Statement:

All modifications to canonical values in the RAIS PRO database must be initiated via an authorized correction event. Direct database corrections without signed regulatory justifications are blocked to prevent compliance breaches.

CAPA-P01-26 Latex compounding viscosity variance. Calibrate tanks and former temperatures. Introduce automated viscosity check loops. Rajesh Kumar 2026-06-25
CAPA-P17-26 Thin spot defects in Visual Inspection. Audit Former speed and depth. Install online laser thickness gauges. Ramesh Chen 2026-06-28
CAPA-P18-26 Balloon burst rejections in test. Adjust forming mold release agent mix. Establish daily die check SOPs. K. Raghavan 2026-06-30
CAPA-P20-26 Valve gluing alignment leakage. Audit valve gluing nozzle pressure. Install automated nozzle-wear checks. S. Srinivasan 2026-07-05

CAPA Policy Enforcement Statement:

All corrective actions listed above are monitored in real-time by the QA Manager and signed off only after satisfactory validation trials. Overdue CAPAs are automatically escalated to the Plant General Manager.

(() => { const outOfControl = m.r1 > 0 || m.r2 > 0 || m.r3 > 0; const modalText = outOfControl ? `Process instability detected! Violations: Rule 1 (Outside UCL/LCL): ${m.r1}, Rule 2 (9 points same side of mean): ${m.r2}, Rule 3 (6 points trend): ${m.r3}. Immediate engineering audit recommended.` : `Process is in statistical control. UCL: ${(m.ucl * 100).toFixed(2)}%, Mean: ${(m.mean * 100).toFixed(2)}%, LCL: ${(m.lcl * 100).toFixed(2)}%.`; return (
openModal("Control Chart", modalText,
, { rows: srcRows({ types: ["production", "inspection"] }), value: pct(m.mean) })}>
Upper Control Limit (UCL) {(m.ucl * 100).toFixed(2)}%
Center Line (Mean) {(m.mean * 100).toFixed(2)}%
Lower Control Limit (LCL) {(m.lcl * 100).toFixed(2)}%
0 ? "var(--critical)" : "var(--positive)" }} /> Rule 1: Outside 3-sigma ({m.r1} violated)
0 ? "var(--warning)" : "var(--positive)" }} /> Rule 2: 9 points on one side ({m.r2} violated)
0 ? "var(--warning)" : "var(--positive)" }} /> Rule 3: 6 points increasing/decreasing ({m.r3} violated)
{outOfControl ? ( <>
⚠️ PROCESS OUT OF STATISTICAL CONTROL Special-cause variation detected. The quality metrics oscillate heavily and show non-random patterns violating Western Electric control rules.
    {m.r1 > 0 && (
  • Rule 1 Violation (Outside Limits): {m.r1} period(s) fell outside the 3-sigma limits (UCL/LCL). This suggests sudden shifts or extreme outliers in production quality. Recommended Action: Perform immediate machine calibration checks and material QC audits.
    • )} {m.r2 > 0 && (
  • Rule 2 Violation (Process Shift): {m.r2} run(s) of 9 consecutive points on one side of the mean. This indicates a sustained process average shift. Recommended Action: Inspect batch tooling adjustments, operator consistency, or setup parameter shifts.
    • )} {m.r3 > 0 && (
  • Rule 3 Violation (Trending Deviation): {m.r3} run(s) of 6 consecutive points steadily increasing or decreasing. This suggests gradual tool wear or calibration decay. Recommended Action: Schedule preventive maintenance and check guide pins/temperature controls.
    • )}
) : (
✓ PROCESS IN STATISTICAL CONTROL Rejection rates exhibit only common-cause (random) variation. All periods fall within the 3-sigma control limits and conform to normal distribution criteria. Continue standard monitoring.
)}
); })
